title: HexWeb
description: A Hexcasting Addon for HTTP Requests and more!
body:
This is an addon for [Hexcasting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) and [MoreIotas](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreiotas/) which adds new patterns and iotas for interacting with the Internet!

## Features
### JSON Iota and Patterns
The base Iota used for the other patterns and spells! Its essentially a JSON wrapper!
### HTTP Requests and Responses
HTTP Spells and Patterns let you make HTTP requests, receiving an Response Iota back for further processing!
### TCP/Web Socket Patterns and Impetus
The Wandering Impetus is an impetus that stores a port and optionally a target host URL and interacts with Sockets! Any message sent to the Sockets trigger the impetus up to 1023 queued String iotas!
